title: [PC,Steam] MechWarrior 5: Mercenaries $10.73 @ Steam
body:
Deal: [PC,Steam] MechWarrior 5: Mercenaries $10.73 @ Steam

[Ahbal] Thoroughly recommend this game. I have around 400 hours on it since launch.
[abowen] Yes. Some better than others, but if buying on sale/bulk, may as well.
[Penalty boxer] Wow I remember playing mechwarrior 3 & 4…
[mr fox] I was there 3000 years ago. For the release of Mechwarrior 2.
[Franc-T] I bought a $200 Force Feedback stick to play Mech 2 + GBL.
No regrets, still have the stick
[rodericb] Oh yeah I bought that bundle too. A friend had it too and after quite a few attempts at connecting played a couple of times against each other via modem. High tech!
[jason andrade] I would play War Robots Frontiers instead.
Basically a Mech game, build and configure your mechs and a nice combat engine.
And a current (2026) game.
Also F2P with paying for ingame stuff.
[rhino86] Depends if you want to play solo or online.
[MHLoppy] Imo it's (unfortunately) a bit barebones without some DLC, so I'd personally recommend having your baseline entry point be Jumpship Edition (currently $30, has 2/8 gameplay DLCs) if you're cautious or Succession Wars Edition (currently $50, has 6/8 DLC gameplay DLCs) if you're not.
Base-game-only might be fine to dip your toes in if you just want to see if you like the core gameplay etc, but if you stick around you'll probably find the procgen missions are quite repetitive and lifeless. The DLCs add more procgen variety and a lot more non-procgen missions.
[bp2000] Is mechwarriors Mercs the better game or clans?
[MHLoppy] Mercs is singleplayer or coop (where non-host players play "as" one of the host's pilots during missions). If you want online PvP, you want MechWarrior Online: https://store.steampowered.com/app/342200/MechWarrior_Online…
[gtech] Yeah more interested in single player play. Cheers
